name: Chicken in Black Bean Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 3/4 inch pieces.
2. Combine the sherry, soy and sesame oil in a 4-cup microwaveable casserole.
3. Toss the chicken in the mixture, cover, and marinate while preparing other ingredients.
4. In a small microwave container, combine stock, cornstarch, soy sauce, sugar, chili paste; set aside.
5. Prepare garlic, ginger, and black beans; set aside.
6. Microwave the chicken and marinade, covered at high for 4 to 6 minutes or until the chicken is opaque and tender. Stir twice during cooking.
7. Stand, covered, while making sauce.
8. In a 2-cup glass microwave container, heat vegetable oil at high for 1 minute or until hot.
9. Stir in garlic, ginger, and black beans; microwave uncovered at high for 1 minute or until fragrant.
10. Stir in the stock mixture until smooth. Microwave at high for 1 to 3 minutes or until the sauce comes to a boil and thickens. Stir once.
11. Drain liquid off chicken, pour black bean sauce over, stir, and serve immediately.
